title: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange
summary: The venture is subject to regulatory approvals but will be co-chaired by ICE and former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who began working with OKX in 2023.

title: Bitcoin weekly close above $63K amid RSI divergence may be bottom signal: Data
summary: Bitcoin's repeated weekly candle close above $63,000 align with signals that may mark a market bottom.

title: CRH to Buy Arcosa in Building Materials Firm’s Biggest Deal
summary: CRH Plc agreed to acquire US construction services company Arcosa for $8.5 billion in what is a record deal for the Irish building materials supplier.

title: Iran Oil Waiver Offers Tehran Crucial Lifeline as Talks Proceed
summary: The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal.

title: Bank of England Eases Stablecoin Rules, Swaps Holding Caps for £40B ‘Guardrail’
summary: The BoE scrapped individual holding caps for a £40 billion per-coin issuance limit and will let issuers hold more reserves in government debt.

title: Ethereum Layer-2 Taiko Warns Users to Withdraw Bridge Funds After Security Breach
summary: Researchers estimate more than $1.7 million was stolen after attackers allegedly exploited Taiko's proof verification process.

title: HIVE stock surges 25% as Ivy League researchers train neural networks on Paraguay GPUs
summary: The research was submitted to NeurIPS, one of AI's leading academic conferences, to be held later this year.

title: Intercontinental Exchange, OKX expand access to tokenized equities via joint venture co-chaired by former Gov. Cuomo
summary: The new joint venture will enable OKX customers in the U.S. and internationally to access ICE futures and NYSE tokenized equities markets.

title: EU-UK summit postponed as Burnham sworn in as MP
